title: selliguea roseomarginata
intro: Selliguea roseomarginata, also known as the Rose-edged Polypody, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Selliguea roseomarginata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
